2606.13171.title: NTS-CoT: Mitigating Hallucinations in LLM-based News Timeline Summarization with Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
2606.13171.paper_summary: The rapid updates of online news make tracking event developments challenging, highlighting the need for timeline summarization (TLS). Hallucinations, where LLM-generated content deviates from source news, still remain a critical issue in LLM-based TLS and are not well studied in existing works. To bridge this gap, we identify two primary types of hallucinations: unfaithful content during news summarization and information omission in date-event summarization. Then, we propose NTS-CoT, a novel framework that leverages Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning to mitigate hallucinations in TLS. The framework consists of three key modules: i) Element-CoT to capture essential news elements for faithful summarization, ii) Date Selection to combine temporal saliency and event prominence for timestamp selection, and iii) Causal-CoT to infer causal relationships and reduce omissions in date-event summarization. Extensive experiments, including quantitative analysis on three TLS benchmarks and human evaluation, demonstrate that NTS-CoT outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, effectively mitigating hallucinations and improving LLM-based TLS performance. Our source code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/NTS-CoT .
2606.13171.paper_summary_zh: 快速更新的在線新聞使得追蹤事件發展變得具有挑戰性，突顯了時間線摘要（TLS）的需求。幻覺，即大型語言模型（LLM）生成的內容偏離來源新聞，仍然是基於LLM的TLS中的一個關鍵問題，且在現有研究中尚未得到充分探討。為了填補這一空白，我們識別出兩種主要的幻覺類型：新聞摘要過程中的不真實內容和日期事件摘要中的信息遺漏。然後，我們提出了NTS-CoT，一個利用思維鏈（CoT）推理來減輕TLS中幻覺的創新框架。該框架由三個關鍵模塊組成：i) Element-CoT，用於捕捉關鍵新聞元素以實現忠實摘要，ii) 日期選擇，結合時間顯著性和事件重要性進行時間戳選擇，以及iii) Causal-CoT，用於推斷因果關係並減少日期事件摘要中的遺漏。廣泛的實驗，包括對三個TLS基準的定量分析和人類評估，表明NTS-CoT在性能上超越了最先進的基準，有效減輕了幻覺並改善了基於LLM的TLS性能。我們的源代碼可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/NTS-CoT 獲得。
2606.13171.author: Feng Lyu et.al.
2606.13171.authors: Feng Lyu, Huiqin Yan, Sijing Duan, Hao Wu, Shuang Gu, Xue Qiao, Weixu Zhang, Haolun Wu
